item.title: Decompose cmd_run() into focused sub-functions
item.intent: Break the 477-line cmd_run() into 5-6 focused functions separating arg parsing, git operations, sprint loop, auto-groom logic, and summary reporting
steps: Extract setup_sprint_environment() for lock, stash, worktree, config loading
Extract run_sprint_loop() for the core pick-implement-validate-merge cycle
Refactor cmd_run to orchestrate the extracted functions
Verify sprint execution still works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Each extracted function has a single clear responsibility
